reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, los baños impecables! Había una persona limpiando y cuidando! Muy bueno en estos tiempos de pandemia!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, the bathrooms were spotless! There was someone cleaning and taking care of everything! Very nice during these pandemic times!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteTRiTTZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo sería restaurar el edificio antiguo del ACA o al menos pintarlo y cortar el pasto.
Le daría mucha más personalidad a la estación YPF que ya se ven todas iguales.

(Translated by Google)
It would be lovely to restore the old ACA building, or at least paint it and mow the lawn. It would give the YPF station much more character; they all look the same these days.
